triples.subject: Vehicle purchases
triples.object: about 3% of real GDP growth in the U.S.
triples.sentence: Vehicle purchases are also a driving force of overall consumer spending, providing about 3% of real GDP growth in the U.S.

triples.subject: The ongoing car chip shortage
triples.sentence: The ongoing car chip shortage, which originated during the COVID-19 pandemic, continues to impact the auto industry’s production capacity.
